user_message: Give me the manager view on this Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery meeting transcript. Need this before my 2pm call.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-01 10:33 EST
Subject: forecast prep - Action Required

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with forecast prep. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
Date: 2024-02-25 15:15 EST
Subject: Re: forecast prep Discussion - Next Steps

Just checking in on the forecast prep proposal. Our Director of IT is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-24 08:21 EST
Subject: forecast prep - Action Required

Our team encountered some challenges with forecast prep. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery: the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk

handoffs.condition: contact and opportunity records need updating

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF38-M trap (No native 'champion-change motion' in skill set); produces complete Stakeholder map delta, opportunity-at-risk assessment, re-engagement plan, contact update proposals,
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF38-M failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF38-M failure mode (No native 'champion-change motion' in skill set)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct forecast prep decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF38-M -- No native 'champion-change motion' in skill set
Produce structural verdict on whether current routing adequately serves this scenario
